# devin_idp_group (Resource)

Registers an IdP group name with the enterprise so roles can be mapped to it via devin_enterprise_idp_group_role or devin_org_idp_group_role. The group has no role assignment on its own.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Register an IdP (SSO) group name so roles can be mapped to it.
resource "devin_idp_group" "engineering" {
  name = "engineering"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) IdP group name as provided by the identity provider.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# IdP groups are imported by group name.
terraform import devin_idp_group.engineering engineering
```
